mapper.insert: INSERT INTO csp_srv_log( logid, appid, nodeid, branchid, trace_id, recv_time, resp_time, txcode, transret, hostname, hostip, errorcode, innererrcode, errormsg, reqmsg, rspmsg, costtimeinfo, signature) VALUES( #{logid}, #{appid}, #{nodeid}, #{branchid}, #{trace_id}, #{recv_time}, #{resp_time}, #{txcode}, #{transret}, #{hostname}, #{hostip}, #{errorcode}, #{innererrcode}, #{errormsg}, #{reqmsg}, #{rspmsg}, #{costtimeinfo}, #{signature})

INSERT INTO csp_srv_log( logid, appid, nodeid, branchid, trace_id, recv_time, resp_time, txcode, transret, hostname, hostip, errorcode, innererrcode, errormsg, reqmsg, rspmsg, costtimeinfo, signature) VALUES( #{logid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{appid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{nodeid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{branchid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{trace_id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{recv_time,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{resp_time,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{txcode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{transret,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{hostname,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{hostip,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{errorcode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{innererrcode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{errormsg,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{reqmsg,jdbcType=CLOB}, #{rspmsg,jdbcType=CLOB}, #{costtimeinfo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{signature,jdbcType=VARCHAR})
